hca5842f9gdd0fg4802g8372g792d67951284: Come on, come on. What are you hiding?
hed804d0cg0f9dg4f2agac21g6d2d9a9d2918: Can you summon the dead? Bring them back? Can you - ugh, can you shut up and let me read?
h5322fae9gc400g4b88ga8cag19739f3c414b: I was just perusing this little find and - WILL YOU SHUT UP?!
h82bf5422gbfb4g46cfgbf8eg4754c35ba7d6: Forgive me. This book reads you more than you read it.
ha2e96785g1cecg4064gacd2gd0173e24dfad: I mean it plays with your mind. There are secrets here, but the book has spirits. They fight you every step of the way.
h6d042d6bg2bd7g457fg97e7g89ef814f397a: I almost reached the end before they drove me out. And drove me all but mad.
h06bf545ag28dcg4191g8a56gb146ed3080d9: Now every time I open it, the voices surge back into my mind. I can't reason with them - they exist to protect that book.
hc1ce50c7g60acg4a31gb41fga97e9331be55: Gale would take it off your hands.
h7f931859g8b84g441fg8e59gf6feb43334cf: No! He's not eating this one. It's too valuable.

hefaa33e5g4543g4063gaeafg2ca94bbb2325: Indeed. As long as the spirits remember their mission, the book is a lost cause.
h2aecdac7g3385g4c9cga614g3db7d2822bac: And I should rest. This has all been a lot.
h02c6b457gf690g4b7agb5a6gac744bd3968a: Keep at it. Maybe you'll figure out a way.
h00262c0cga87ag401dg9151g45e3f4a38540: As long as those spirits remember their mission, I doubt it. Keeping the book safe is all they know.
hced6c0b8g9c1fg4f1bg8a26ga05194365af0: But still, we live in hope. Figuratively speaking.
h6b56c207ge30ag4fc7gaa67g745591c7d390: What are you hoping to find in there anyway?
hc74ef59dg8ca0g445agafabg82d9ef80bb24: It's a book of necromancy, full of secrets about controlling the dead, returning the dead to life, and who knows what else.
hff5bf613g5cc4g4bc1gac5agb0c0f7deb655: Whatever's in here, it might give me an edge over Cazador. Or free me from him entirely.
h50bebbdcg22d9g4833gb62bgceb3b147f3bf: Although I can't make any progress as long as those spirits remember their mission. It seems to be all they know.
h9625e42bg67d0g4f5eg83cegbb2a776c14b3: Still. If nothing else, maybe I can beat Cazador to death with it.
h33ae8f39gcc0dg44e6ga23cg67f17cf964ee: Whatever's in here, it might give me an edge over my old master Cazador. Or free me from him entirely.
hfd68efb6gbf99g4fbeg8c6dged84e3d713e6: I could hold on to it if you like?
hb1c55db7g92f4g42a1g9de8g2e7af0606a15: Trust me, the spirits won't be any kinder to you. As long as they remember their duty to protect this book, no one's getting in.
hb568b8bagdb16g4c7cgbbb5g77cd07759fef: Anyway, I'd rather keep it where I can see it. Its time will come, I'm sure.
h730f946ag8554g4524g95d2g4f6189dc58e6: It's powerful magic, not to be toyed with. I could take it off your hands.
hd2cd3b94g7eb6g46eegb351g9d2434bb48a7: No! You're not eating this one. It's too valuable.
hf1a704bbg976fg4a69gb786g1d9e4906eac3: Generous, but I'd prefer to keep it. It may be rather valuable.
hebe6f765g8f57g41degbae5g71b504c4155f: I don't know. That's the point - they're secret.

h24ecb9fag2b26g4235g9f2dg372abac11161: Thank you, very helpful. But I can't risk it. There's something valuable in here.
